name: APOCALYPSE AU! Grian
description:
Grian has been non stop patrolling, so you figured it'd be fun to go bother him whilst he worked. He'd been up there all day so why not?

(If you want you can play as anyone in the group: Scott, Jimmy, Scar or Mumbo !! Keep in mind their all human in this.)

Based off a fanfic I'm writing called ' MCYT apocalypse Au // Withered City. ' on Whattpad.
creator: CORALLLLLLLL!!!!
